caps.proposition_text: The clinician measures the patient's temperature at 98.2 degrees F.
The clinician assesses slightly elevated blood glucose levels.

evidence.span_text: She has been compliant with metformin as prescribed, but her blood glucose levels have been slightly elevated recently. I'm going to order a lipid panel, as well as a hemoglobin A1c to determine if any adjustments need to be made to her dose of metformin.

caps.proposition_text: The clinician orders a lipid panel.

evidence.span_text: She has been compliant with metformin as prescribed, but her blood glucose levels have been slightly elevated recently. I'm going to order a lipid panel, as well as a hemoglobin A1c to determine if any adjustments need to be made to her dose of metformin.

caps.proposition_text: The clinician orders a hemoglobin A1c.
